pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly downloads and places the data file at this absolute path.

pi_items.verified_value: DEM from github.com/opengeos/data (NAVD88 vertical datum, likely USGS NED/3DEP)
pi_items.source: Python rasterio analysis of the downloaded TIFF revealed EPSG:3857 CRS and NAVD88 vertical datum. SRTM DEMs use EGM96 vertical datum.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real Digital Elevation Model (DEM) downloaded from github.com/opengeos/data. While the metadata and file name claim it is an SRTM DEM, inspection of the TIFF tags shows it uses the NAVD88 vertical datum and EPSG:3857 projection (covering a region in Oregon, USA). This indicates it is likely a USGS North American DEM (e.g., 3DEP or NED) rather than SRTM. The file is reliably placed at /home/ga/snap_data/srtm_dem.tif by the setup script.
